name: Fried Wild Game Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the diced duck and pheasant in butter until cooked through.
2. Add the sliced leeks, sherry wine, red wine, praline paste to the pan. Reduce the mixture by half.
3. Stir in the sour cherries and demi-glaze. Continue reducing and season with salt and pepper.
4. Allow the filling to cool completely.
5. To prepare the frangllica butter, reduce the Frangelica to two tablespoons. Add ground filberts and heavy cream. Reduce until warm.
6. Gradually whisk in butter until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Assemble ravioli by placing a spoonful of filling onto each wonton skin. Brush with egg wash and sprinkle semolina flour on the outside.
8. Fry the ravioli in batches until golden brown.
9. Garnish with fried julienne of zucchini, carrots, and squash.
10. Serve 6 portions.
